purpose: Tie one completed self-target command-buffer init transition to its claim, proof certificate, schematic trace, rendered SVG, and source-status boundaries.
positive_example: self command buffer processor left init
boundaries: This bundle covers only self-target init-family command-buffer dispatch.
Self-target non-init command buffers remain at the unsupported append boundary.
standard-signal command-token execution and write-buffer command-token execution remain source-blocked.
